payload.description:
As an operator, I want to recompute FeedbackItem metrics from 2026-04-24T00:00:00Z, so that missing dashboard data is restored after the aggregation outage.

Feature: FeedbackItem metrics backfill

Scenario: Feedback metrics are backfilled after an outage
Given FeedbackItems exist from 2026-04-24T00:00:00Z onward
When the operator runs metrics update for feedbackItems, feedbackItemsByScorecard, and feedbackItemsByScore
Then AggregatedMetrics matches recomputed FeedbackItem counts for each scope
And metrics verify reports no differences for the backfill window.
payload.title: FeedbackItem metrics can be backfilled from April 24
